description: Token migration manifest for TomTom Navigation Design System v1.1.

added.description: Semantic colour for an EV charging station that has available connectors.

Light.description: Mint 300 — vivid teal on light backgrounds

Dark.description: Mint 400 — darker teal for dark map surfaces

added.description: Bottom safe-area inset for floating and docked panels. Clears gesture-navigation bars on Android and iOS.

Large.description: Large screen — full gesture bar height

Medium.description: Medium screen — full gesture bar height

renamed.description: Accent colour for active guidance UI — NIP, lane guidance, speed shields, ETA panel.
renamed.migration: Replace all references to 'tt_sys_color_nip_accent' with 'tt_sys_color_guidance_accent'. No value change — swap is safe.

deprecated.description: Legacy warning colour on route-message banners. Predates the system-level feedback palette.
deprecated.migration: Replace with 'tt_sys_color_feedback_warning'. Verify visual parity in both Light and Dark themes.
